# 核聚变

Nuclear fusion mimics the Sun, fusing light nuclei to release enormous energy. Tokamaks are the most promising devices; [[iter]] is building the world's largest. Plasma confinement is the core challenge. Commercial fusion would provide virtually unlimited clean energy. Related to energy revolution visions in [[energy-policy-history]].
